EmailConfirmed.description: Indicates if the user's email address has been confirmed.

PreventFromUsingCards.description: Indicates if the user is prevented from using cards.

IsUserPhoneNumberBlocked.description: Indicates if the user's phone number is blocked.

UserWhiteLabels.description: List of white label information associated with the user.

UserId.description: The unique identifier for the user.

HasLoggedIn.description: Indicates if the user has logged in.

DisableAppRatingControl.description: Indicates if the app rating control is disabled for the user.

GloballyOptedOut.description: Indicates if the user has globally opted out.

CompletedOrderCount.description: The number of completed orders by the user.

CancelledOrderCount.description: The number of cancelled orders by the user.

OrderTotalValue.description: The total value of orders placed by the user.

TsMostRecentOrder.description: The timestamp of the user's most recent order.

TsFirstOrder.description: The timestamp of the user's first order.

IsRestaurantUser.description: Indicates if the user is a restaurant user.

Installs.description: List of app installs associated with the user.

DeliveryLocations.description: List of delivery locations associated with the user.

PaymentAccounts.description: List of payment accounts associated with the user.

LanguageId.description: The language identifier for the user.

CurrentLanguageName.description: Current language name for the user.

Languages.description: Available languages that the user can choose from.

SalesForceContactId.description: The Salesforce contact ID for the user.

StripeCustomerId.description: The Stripe customer ID for the user.
